$comment: TD-NAME-001 / RF1.4.4 pay-down ledger. Every package whose sql.go
still uses bare column names against a renamed (§2.6 root family)
table is listed here. As each domain's column-rename migration
ships, the package is REMOVED from this list — that's how the
ledger shrinks. End-state: empty array → lint becomes fail-on-
violation in lint_column_prefix_convention.py and warn-only mode
